title: C360CompliancesRiskLevel
description: Payload for Compliances Risk Level widget — distribution of all compliances across 4 risk categories (Low, Medium, High, Zero Tolerance) with pre-computed counts and percentages. Backend provides one row per risk level. Single narrator bullet output.

riskLevel.description: Risk level label as returned by backend (e.g. Low, Medium, High, Zero Tolerance)

count.description: Count of compliances in this risk level

percent.description: Pre-computed: (count / totalCompliances) × 100, rounded to 1 decimal. Empty string when totalCompliances = 0.

riskMix.description: Risk distribution across all compliances. Items sorted by count descending.

totalCompliances.description: Total count of all compliances across all risk levels

items.description: All 4 risk levels sorted by count descending
